David E. Erickson, of Bates Winter & Mistretta LLP, Tel. 916.789.7080, for defendants and opposing party, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

ARGUED. PLAINTIFF TERESA COLEMAN, RONALD COLEMAN Mtn To Compel Deft Hilton Management, LLC'S Production Of Investigative Report is taken under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

APPEARANCES - ATTY. HENRY HARMELING IV, TEL. NO. (760)632-7700 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT HILTON MANAGEMENT LLC's Motion For Order For Separate Trial On The Issue Of Liability is Denied without prejudice to raising the issue to the trial judge.
